{{cs1 config|name-list-style=vanc}}
{{Infobox_gene}}
'''Phosphatase and tensin homolog (mutated in multiple advanced cancers 1), pseudogene 1''', also known as '''PTENP1''', is a human [[pseudogene]]<ref name="entrez">{{cite web | title = Entrez Gene: PTENP1 phosphatase and tensin homolog (mutated in multiple advanced cancers 1), pseudogene 1| url = https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene?Db=gene&Cmd=ShowDetailView&TermToSearch=11191| access-date = }}</ref> which has a partial reactivated function as a [[Competing endogenous RNA (CeRNA)|competing endogenous RNA]] regulating  the tumor suppressor gene [[PTEN (gene)|PTEN]].<ref>{{cite journal | vauthors = Poliseno L, Salmena L, Zhang J, Carver B, Haveman WJ, Pandolfi PP | title = A coding-independent function of gene and pseudogene mRNAs regulates tumour biology | journal = Nature | volume = 465 | issue = 7301 | pages = 1033–8 | date = June 2010 | pmid = 20577206 | doi = 10.1038/nature09144 | pmc = 3206313 | bibcode = 2010Natur.465.1033P }}*{{lay source |template = cite web|vauthors = Buehler J|url = https://www.quantamagazine.org/the-complex-truth-about-junk-dna-20210901/   |title = The Complex Truth About ‘Junk DNA’|date = September 1, 2021 |website = Quanta Magazine }}</ref>

== References ==
{{reflist}}

== Further reading ==
{{refbegin | 2}}

* {{cite journal | vauthors = Dahia PL, FitzGerald MG, Zhang X, Marsh DJ, Zheng Z, Pietsch T, von Deimling A, Haluska FG, Haber DA, Eng C | title = A highly conserved processed PTEN pseudogene is located on chromosome band 9p21 | journal = Oncogene | volume = 16 | issue = 18 | pages = 2403–6 | date = May 1998 | pmid = 9620558 | doi = 10.1038/sj.onc.1201762 | doi-access =  | s2cid = 33570502 }}
* {{cite journal | vauthors = Forgacs E, Biesterveld EJ, Sekido Y, Fong K, Muneer S, Wistuba II, Milchgrub S, Brezinschek R, Virmani A, Gazdar AF, Minna JD | title = Mutation analysis of the PTEN/MMAC1 gene in lung cancer | journal = Oncogene | volume = 17 | issue = 12 | pages = 1557–65 | date = September 1998 | pmid = 9794233 | doi = 10.1038/sj.onc.1202070 | s2cid = 24423191 | doi-access = free }}
* {{cite journal | vauthors = Fujii GH, Morimoto AM, Berson AE, Bolen JB | title = Transcriptional analysis of the PTEN/MMAC1 pseudogene, psiPTEN | journal = Oncogene | volume = 18 | issue = 9 | pages = 1765–9 | date = March 1999 | pmid = 10208437 | doi = 10.1038/sj.onc.1202492 | doi-access =  | s2cid = 5938219 }}
* {{cite journal | vauthors = Trojan J, Plotz G, Brieger A, Raedle J, Meltzer SJ, Wolter M, Zeuzem S | title = Activation of a cryptic splice site of PTEN and loss of heterozygosity in benign skin lesions in Cowden disease | journal = The Journal of Investigative Dermatology | volume = 117 | issue = 6 | pages = 1650–3 | date = December 2001 | pmid = 11886535 | doi = 10.1046/j.0022-202x.2001.01954.x | doi-access = free }}
